    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static SshClientAPI.SshConnectionConfig
    SshClientAPI.SshConnectionConfig.defaults()
    Auto-detects the best available SSH key on the current machine.
    static SshClientAPI.SshConnectionConfig
    SshClientAPI.SshConnectionConfig.defaultsEd25519()
    ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 — explicit ED25519, no auto-detection.
    static SshClientAPI.SshConnectionConfig
    SshClientAPI.SshConnectionConfig.withKey(String privateKeyPath)
    Specific key file, no passphrase.
    static SshClientAPI.SshConnectionConfig
    SshClientAPI.SshConnectionConfig.withKey(String privateKeyPath, String passphrase)
    Specific key file with passphrase.
    static SshClientAPI.SshConnectionConfig
    SshClientAPI.SshConnectionConfig.withPassword(String password)
    Plain user password — no key file required.
    SshClientAPI.SshConnectionConfig
    SshClientAPI.SshConnectionConfig.withStrictHostChecking()
    Returns a copy with strict host key checking enabled.
    SshClientAPI.SshConnectionConfig
    SshClientAPI.SshConnectionConfig.withTimeout(int seconds)
    Returns a copy with a different timeout.
